corrections.correct: ἐρρῶσθε, καὶ τὰ τέκνα· καὶ τὰ ἴδια

corrections.current: καὶ τὰ ἴδια κατὰ γνώμην ὑμῶν ἔστιν.
corrections.correct: καὶ τὰ ἴδια κατὰ γνώμην ὑμῶν ἔσται.
corrections.note: Printed text has future ἔσται, not ἔστιν.
A separator bar is present before the next variant εσται] εστι V.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct, but one substantive lexical error at v.18, one omission and one verb-form error at v.20, and one wrong verb at v.24. Apparatus largely matches; one omitted phrase after ασφαλειας and one missing separator bar were noted.
